name: peaka-mcp-server
description: MCP server for querying Peaka data using natural language and SQL

PEAKA_API_KEY.title: Peaka API Key
PEAKA_API_KEY.description: Your Peaka API key. Accepts both Partner API keys (multi-project) and Project API keys (single-project).

tools.name: peaka_list_projects
tools.description: List all projects accessible with the current API key, across all organizations and workspaces. Also shows the currently active project.

tools.name: peaka_select_project
tools.description: Set the active project for the session. All subsequent tool calls will use this project. Use peaka_list_projects to find available project IDs. Pass an empty string to reset to the default project.

tools.name: peaka_get_project_metadata
tools.description: Get metadata for all catalogs, schemas, and tables in the Peaka project in a single call. Optionally filter by catalogId and/or schemaName. Use this tool to discover the data structure before writing queries.

tools.name: peaka_query_golden_sqls
tools.description: Query question/SQL pairs from Peaka's golden SQL vector store. If you find an existing query matching the user's question, just use it. Otherwise use the other tools to figure out the tables and write the query.

tools.name: peaka_execute_sql_query
tools.description: Runs the given SQL query on Peaka. Before running, use peaka_get_project_metadata to determine tables and schemas. If tables are cacheable but not cached, warn the user and offer to start caching.

tools.name: peaka_list_queries
tools.description: List all saved queries in the Peaka project. Returns query names, SQL content, and whether they are plain or materialized.

tools.name: peaka_execute_query
tools.description: Execute a saved query by its ID in the Peaka project. Use peaka_list_queries to find available query IDs.

tools.name: peaka_create_cache
tools.description: Create a cache for a table in the Peaka project. Caching a table improves query performance by storing the data locally.

tools.name: peaka_get_cache_statuses
tools.description: Get all cache statuses for tables in the Peaka project. Returns the current caching state, execution history, and progress for each cached table.

tools.name: peaka_schema_retriever
tools.description: Retrieve table metadata and schema. Metadata has column types and relationships of the table with other tables. Use this tool if you can't find a golden query and you have to write the query yourself.

tools.name: peaka_list_catalogs
tools.description: List all available catalogs in the Peaka project. Returns catalog names, types, and connection info.

tools.name: peaka_list_schemas
tools.description: List all available schemas for a given catalog in the Peaka project.

tools.name: peaka_list_tables
tools.description: List all available tables for a given catalog and schema in the Peaka project.

tools.name: peaka_list_columns
tools.description: List all columns for a given table in the Peaka project. Returns column names, data types, and constraints. Use peaka_get_project_metadata first to discover available catalogs, schemas, and tables.

tools.name: peaka_refresh_project_metadata
tools.description: Refresh project metadata for a specific catalog. Use when a data source has structurally changed (e.g. new tables or columns added). This is a long-running operation that polls until completion.

tools.name: peaka_get_metadata_refresh_status
tools.description: Check the current status of a metadata refresh job for a specific catalog.
